_comment: Flow 06 — EU multi-airport cross-country LSZG → LSZB. Complete manual §6: departure from LSZG with Ground/Tower handoff, leaving frequency, en-route (silent; simulated via airport switch), arrival at LSZB (tower-only) with inbound call, pattern, landing, runway vacated + taxi to parking on Tower. Exercises two-airport state machine transitions in a single run.
name: EU multi-cross-country — LSZG → LSZB

say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo from parking request taxi

say.note: LSZG Step 2 — Ground: ready for departure, on course
say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo holding short ready for departure on course
Grenchen Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo ready for departure on course
Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo leaving your frequency good day

say.note: — En route to LSZB (silent). Airport change while EN_ROUTE auto-resets the ATC state machine (atc_session.cpp does this every frame).
LSZB Step 5 — Tower: inbound for landing
say.text: Bern Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo ten miles northwest inbound for landing
Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo midfield left downwind
Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo on final full stop

say.note: LSZB Step 8 — Tower (tower-only): runway vacated bundles the taxi clearance (no Ground handoff)
say.text: Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo clear of the runway

say.note: LSZB Step 9 — Tower (tower-only): taxi to parking
say.text: Bern Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo request taxi to general aviation parking
